news-korea-econ.title: DHS Sec Mullin points finger at Newsom over alleged Chinese infiltration of California after CCP mayor charged
news-korea-econ.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin blames Gov. Gavin Newsom's policies for leading to alleged Chinese infiltration of California after a local mayor was charged as a China agent.

news-global-econ.title: RBI Governor sees fuel price hike if crude oil stays high
news-global-econ.description: His remarks came after Prime Minister Narendra Modi urged voluntary austerity, including cutting down on petrol and diesel use and putting off gold purchases, to preserve foreign exchange reserves.

news-global-econ.title: MLB owners and players begin CBA negotiations in New York as salary cap fight looms over 2026 season
news-global-econ.description: MLB labor negotiations are officially underway as the league and MLBPA meet to discuss the next CBA, with a potential lockout on the horizon.

news-global-econ.title: Seattle Democrat rejects wealth 'exodus’ concerns as businesses flee for lower-tax states
news-global-econ.description: As Starbucks moves jobs to Nashville, Washington Democrats push a new 9.9% tax on high earners, ignoring warnings of a massive taxpayer flight.

news-global-econ.title: Washington manufacturer leaving state after 48 years, citing crime, taxes, political climate
news-global-econ.description: Washington manufacturer Delta Camshaft announced it is leaving the state after nearly 50 years, with its owner citing rising crime, skyrocketing taxes and insurance.

news-global-soc.title: New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherrill announces another NJ Transit World Cup ticket cut days after first reduction
news-global-soc.description: NJ Transit 2026 FIFA World Cup train ticket prices cut again to $98 round-trip after Gov. Mikie Sherrill revealed sponsors that helped lower costs for fans.
